analysis: Ablation removing label smoothing (`label_smoothing=0.0`) while retaining the best setting so far (`S = V_norm`). This achieves 75.47%. Removing label smoothing degrades performance slightly compared to retaining `label_smoothing=0.1` (75.65%). It shows that even with pairwise visual margins explicitly addressing hard fine-grained confusions, the model still benefits from general uniform overconfidence regularization.
